mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the equity discount rate, lifting present-valued cash flows and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When monthly unemployment drops below 5.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in less than 40% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Joint increases in housing starts and nonfarm payrolls signal synchronized construction activity and income growth, boosting corporate earnings expectations and lifting 60-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint proxy increases fail to predict positive 60d returns in more than 50% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates supply-side capacity utilization, reducing input cost bottlenecks and supporting near-term equity valuations during early-cycle recoveries.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when INDPRO accelerates during high inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in retail sales revenue signals weakening consumer demand, compressing corporate profit margins and driving negative 20-day forward returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines more than 2% over three consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain positive despite consecutive RSAFS declines.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth exceeding the historical trend rate of 2.5% expands aggregate demand, directly boosting equity cash flows and lifting 60-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window despite GDP outperformance.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the federal funds rate and core inflation compress real borrowing costs and stabilize pricing power, generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint rate and inflation declines fail to produce positive 20d returns in more than 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating nonfarm payrolls signal expanding business investment and consumer income, driving positive equity returns over the next week during mid-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative when payroll growth exceeds 200k but unemployment remains above 5.5%.
